steps.title: Set up the proportion using the given ratio
steps.content:
The ratio of black to red pens is 8: 1. Since there are 40 black pens, we can set up the proportion:
$$\frac{\text{black}}{\text{red}} = \frac{8}{1} = \frac{40}{x}$$
where $x$ is the number of red pens we need to find.

steps.title: Cross multiply and solve
steps.content:
Cross multiplying:
$$8x = 40$$
Divide both sides by 8:
$$x = 5$$
A is correct.
